en: Flee for safety, O people of Benjamin, from the midst of Jerusalem! Blow the trumpet in Tekoa, and raise a signal on Beth-haccherem, for disaster looms out of the north, and great destruction.
zh: “便雅憫人哪！趕快逃命， 離開耶路撒冷。 你們要在提哥亞吹角， 在伯．哈基琳升烽火； 因為災禍和嚴重的毀滅， 已從北方迫近。

en: The lovely and delicately bred I will destroy, the daughter of Zion.
zh: 美麗高貴的錫安居民 ， 我必除滅你們。

en: Shepherds with their flocks shall come against her; they shall pitch their tents around her; they shall pasture, each in his place.
zh: 牧人必帶著他們的羊群， 來到錫安那裡， 在城的四圍支搭帳棚， 各在自己的地方分別牧放羊群。”

en: "Prepare war against her; arise, and let us attack at noon! Woe to us, for the day declines, for the shadows of evening lengthen!
zh: “你們要備戰攻擊她！ 起來！我們趁著正午上去。 唉！可惜日漸西沉， 暮影拖長了！

en: Arise, and let us attack by night and destroy her palaces!"
zh: 起來！我們趁著夜間上去， 毀壞她的堡壘。”

en: For thus says the LORD of hosts: "Cut down her trees; cast up a siege mound against Jerusalem. This is the city that must be punished; there is nothing but oppression within her.
zh: 因為萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “砍下她的樹木， 築壘攻打耶路撒冷； 她是那該受懲罰的城， 其中盡是欺壓的事。

en: As a well keeps its water fresh, so she keeps fresh her evil; violence and destruction are heard within her; sickness and wounds are ever before me.
zh: 井怎樣湧出水來， 這城也怎樣湧出惡來； 城中常常聽到強暴和毀滅的事， 在我面前不斷有病患與創傷。

en: Be warned, O Jerusalem, lest I turn from you in disgust, lest I make you a desolation, an uninhabited land."
zh: 耶路撒冷啊！應當受警戒， 免得我的心與你疏遠， 免得我使你荒涼， 成為無人居住之地。”

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts: "They shall glean thoroughly as a vine the remnant of Israel; like a grape-gatherer pass your hand again over its branches."
zh: 萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “任憑他們像摘淨葡萄一樣對待以色列剩下的人； 你要像摘葡萄的人， 向枝子伸手，摘了又摘。”

en: To whom shall I speak and give warning, that they may hear? Behold, their ears are uncircumcised, they cannot listen; behold, the word of the LORD is to them an object of scorn; they take no pleasure in it.
zh: 我可以向誰說話，向誰警告， 使他們可以聽從呢？ 他們的耳朵未受割禮， 不能聽聞； 看哪！他們以耶和華的話為羞辱， 一點也不喜歡。

en: Therefore I am full of the wrath of the LORD; I am weary of holding it in. "Pour it out upon the children in the street, and upon the gatherings of young men, also; both husband and wife shall be taken, the elderly and the very aged.
zh: 因此，我心裡充滿耶和華的忿怒， 無法容忍。 “你要把我的忿怒向街上的孩童傾倒， 又傾在聯群集結的年輕人身上。 夫妻一起被捉住， 年老的、壽高的也不例外。

en: Their houses shall be turned over to others, their fields and wives together, for I will stretch out my hand against the inhabitants of the land," declares the LORD.
zh: 他們的房屋、田地與妻子， 都要一起轉歸別人； 因為我要伸手， 攻擊這地的居民。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "For from the least to the greatest of them, everyone is greedy for unjust gain; and from prophet to priest, everyone deals falsely.
zh: “他們從最小的到最大的， 個個都貪圖不義之財； 從先知到祭司， 全都行事詭詐。

en: They have healed the wound of my people lightly, saying, 'Peace, peace,' when there is no peace.
zh: 他們草率地醫治我子民 的損傷， 說：‘平安了！平安了！’ 其實沒有平安。”

en: Were they ashamed when they committed abomination? No, they were not at all ashamed; they did not know how to blush. Therefore they shall fall among those who fall; at the time that I punish them, they shall be overthrown," says the LORD.
zh: 耶和華說： “他們行了可憎的事，本應覺得羞愧， 可是他們一點羞愧都沒有， 恬不知恥。 因此他們必仆倒在倒下的人中間， 我懲罰他們的時候，他們必倒下來。”

en: Thus says the LORD: "Stand by the roads, and look, and ask for the ancient paths, where the good way is; and walk in it, and find rest for your souls. But they said, 'We will not walk in it.'
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “你們要站在路上察看， 尋訪遠古的路徑， 看哪一條是美善的路，就走在其中； 這樣，你們心裡就必得安息。 他們卻說：‘我們不走在其中。’

en: I set watchmen over you, saying, 'Pay attention to the sound of the trumpet!' But they said, 'We will not pay attention.'
zh: 我設立守望的人照管你們，說： ‘你們要留心聽號角的聲音！’ 他們卻說：‘我們不聽！’

en: Therefore hear, O nations, and know, O congregation, what will happen to them.
zh: 列國啊！因此你們要聽。 以色列會眾啊！要曉得他們將遭遇的。

en: Hear, O earth; behold, I am bringing disaster upon this people, the fruit of their devices, because they have not paid attention to my words; and as for my law, they have rejected it.
zh: 大地啊，要聽！ 我必使災禍臨到這人民， 這是他們的意圖帶來的結果； 因為他們沒有留心聽我的話， 我的律法他們也棄絕了。

en: What use to me is frankincense that comes from Sheba, or sweet cane from a distant land? Your burnt offerings are not acceptable, nor your sacrifices pleasing to me.
zh: 從示巴來的乳香， 從遠地出的菖蒲，獻給我有甚麼益處呢？ 你們的燔祭不蒙悅納， 你們的祭祀我不喜悅。”

en: Therefore thus says the LORD: 'Behold, I will lay before this people stumbling blocks against which they shall stumble; fathers and sons together, neighbor and friend shall perish.'"
zh: 因此，耶和華這樣說： “我要把絆腳石放在這人民的前面， 他們父子一起在其上絆倒， 鄰舍與朋友也都滅亡。”

en: Thus says the LORD: "Behold, a people is coming from the north country, a great nation is stirring from the farthest parts of the earth.
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “看哪！有一個民族從北方之地而來， 有一大國被激動從地極來到。

en: They lay hold on bow and javelin; they are cruel and have no mercy; the sound of them is like the roaring sea; they ride on horses, set in array as a man for battle, against you, O daughter of Zion!"
zh: 他們緊握弓和槍， 性情殘忍，毫無憐憫； 他們的聲音像海洋怒吼； 錫安的居民 哪！ 他們騎著戰馬， 在戰場上如同一人，列陣攻擊你們。”

en: We have heard the report of it; our hands fall helpless; anguish has taken hold of us, pain as of a woman in labor.
zh: 我們聽到有關他們的消息， 手就發軟； 痛苦緊緊抓住我們， 我們疼痛好像正在生產的婦人。

en: Go not out into the field, nor walk on the road, for the enemy has a sword; terror is on every side.
zh: 你們不要出到田野去， 也不要在路上走， 因為四圍有仇敵的刀劍和驚嚇。

en: O daughter of my people, put on sackcloth, and roll in ashes; make mourning as for an only son, most bitter lamentation, for suddenly the destroyer will come upon us.
zh: 我的同胞 啊！應當披上麻布， 在灰塵中打滾， 悲哀如喪獨生子， 號咷痛哭， 因為有行毀滅的 會突然攻擊我們。

en: "I have made you a tester of metals among my people, that you may know and test their ways.
zh: “我使你在我子民中作鑒辨和試驗的 ， 好讓你查察、鑒別他們的行徑。”

en: They are all stubbornly rebellious, going about with slanders; they are bronze and iron; all of them act corruptly.
zh: 他們都是十分悖逆的人， 到處搬弄是非。 他們是銅是鐵， 他們都是敗壞的。

en: The bellows blow fiercely; the lead is consumed by the fire; in vain the refining goes on, for the wicked are not removed.
zh: 風箱猛烈地吹， 鉛在火中銷熔； 他們煉而又煉，徒勞無功， 因為邪惡的仍未除去。

en: Rejected silver they are called, for the LORD has rejected them."
zh: 人要稱他們為被棄的銀渣， 因為耶和華把他們棄絕了。
